title: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g id='dashboard' transform='translate(20,20)'>
  <rect id='header' x='-20' y='-20' width='400' height='80' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <rect id='charts' x='0' y='60' width='200' height='140' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <rect id='query-playground' x='220' y='60' width='180' height='140' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <rect id='analytics' x='0' y='200' width='400' height='90' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/>
  <text id='title' x='20' y='30' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='24'>Real-Time Analytics</text>
  <text id='query-title' x='250' y='130' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18'>Query Playground</text>
  <text id='analytics-title' x='20' y='220' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18'>Rich Analytics Table</text>
  <path id='chart1' d='M 50,50 Q 150,50 150,100 Q 150,150 100,150 Q 50,150 50,100 Z' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/>
  <path id='chart2' d='M 180,50 Q 220,50 220,100 Q 220,150 200,150 Q 180,150 180,100 Z' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/>
  <path id='chart3' d='M 250,50 Q 300,50 300,100 Q 300,150 280,150 Q 250,150 250,100 Z' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/>
  <g id='query-inputs'>
    <rect x='20' y='60' width='150' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
    <text x='25' y='80' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14'>Search Query</text>
    <text x='25' y='110' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14'>Filter Data</text>
  </g>
  <g id='analytics-table' transform='translate(20,230)'>
    <rect width='380' height='60' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/>
    <text x='10' y='30' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18'>Column 1</text>
    <text x='200' y='30' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18'>Column 2</text>
    <text x='390' y='30' dominant-baseline='middle' text-anchor='start' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18'>Column 3</text>
  </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement multiple chart visualizations with AI-driven data filtering
Must include a query playground with search query and filter data input
Must implement a rich analytics table with sorting capabilities

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI-Powered Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, query input, filter input, and sorting capabilities.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
